query: Fetch BigEarthNet images from June 2017. Then run the ResNet-32 LCC classifer on the images. Last, plot the LCC classes of category 'Non-irrigated arable land'.

task0.objective: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset specifically from June 2017.

task1.objective: Run the ResNet-32 classifier on the fetched BigEarthNet images to detect the 'Non-irrigated arable land' LCC class.

task2.objective: Plot the classification results indicating the 'Non-irrigated arable land' class on the map.
